basics.name: Ye Bhone Lin
basics.summary: AI engineer and researcher focused on speech and natural language processing for low-resource Southeast Asian languages, especially Burmese.

work.name: Language Understanding Laboratory
work.summary: Research on ASR error correction and speech modeling for low-resource Burmese.

work.name: Simbolo & SimboloAI
work.summary: Built educational chatbots, text-to-image systems, and Burmese Romanization tools.

work.name: Omdena AI
work.summary: Contributed to global ML projects in weather forecasting, water quality prediction, and early warning systems.

publications.name: myMedi-Whisper: Construction of Burmese Medical Speech Corpus and Whisper Fine-Tuning for Clinical Dialogue ASR
publications.summary: Co-authored conference paper on Burmese medical speech corpus construction and Whisper fine-tuning for clinical dialogue ASR.

publications.name: ASR Error Correction in Low-Resource Burmese with Alignment-Enhanced Transformers using Phonetic Features
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the 20th IEEE iSAI-NLP AIoT 2025
publications.summary: Co-authored conference paper on alignment-enhanced transformer methods for Burmese ASR error correction.

teaching.description: Educate participants in real-time machine learning algorithm development through practical, hands-on instruction.

portfolio.name: One Project One Week Hackathon Winner
portfolio.description: Built an AI-powered LMS for rural education with TypeScript, Python, and Laravel.

portfolio.name: Myanmar Python Hackathon Winner
portfolio.description: Developed a smart water distribution optimization system with ML-based leak detection and predictive maintenance.
